component.name: Kbd
component.description: Display a keyboard key or shortcut badge.

useCases: Showing keyboard shortcuts next to menu items
Inline keyboard key references in instructional text

commonPatterns.name: in-tooltip
commonPatterns.description: Shortcut hint inside a tooltip (auto-adjusts colors)

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Kbd for non-keyboard content like status badges
antiPatterns.reason: Kbd has semantic meaning tied to keyboard input
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Badge for status labels or tags

antiPatterns.scenario: Using multiple Kbd elements without KbdGroup for a combo
antiPatterns.reason: Keys in a combination should be visually grouped together
antiPatterns.alternative: Wrap combo keys in KbdGroup for proper spacing

responsive.mobile: Typically hidden on mobile (keyboard shortcuts are irrelevant on touch)
responsive.desktop: Displayed inline alongside actions or in tooltips

rules: Use KbdGroup to wrap multi-key combinations
Kbd auto-adjusts its colors when nested inside tooltip-content
Kbd supports SVG icons for modifier keys (size-3 by default)

aiHints.context: Use to display keyboard keys or shortcuts. Wrap combos in KbdGroup. Automatically adapts styling when placed inside TooltipContent (inverted colors). Non-interactive, purely informational.
